description: Confirm or reject a cross-operator match request. Sent by the originating operator (seller's exchange) in response to a federation:match-request. Fulfills the match-request future. On confirmation, the originating operator commits to delivering content to the buyer. On rejection, the receiving operator removes the entry from match results and informs the buyer.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the federation:match-request being responded to.

args.name: confirmed
args.description: Whether the match is confirmed (true) or rejected (false).

args.name: reject_reason
args.description: Reason for rejection. Required if confirmed is false.

args.name: delivery_transport
args.description: Transport details for content delivery to the buyer. Required if confirmed is true. Object: {method: 'direct' | 'relay', endpoint: string, encryption: 'x25519-xsalsa20-poly1305'}.

args.name: price_micro_tokens
args.description: Suggested price in micro-tokens. Advisory — the receiving operator sets the final buyer-facing price. Required if confirmed is true.
